canonical_question: What are the SOX compliance requirements for public companies?
aliases: SOX internal controls over financial reporting
SOX audit requirements for public companies
SOX compliance for foreign private issuers

temporal_validity.last_breaking_change: PCAOB AS 2201 amendments approved by SEC, effective December 15, 2026

constraints: Applies only to SEC-registered companies — private companies are not subject to SOX
Section 404(b) auditor attestation exemption for non-accelerated filers and EGCs
PCAOB AS 2201 amendments effective for fiscal years beginning on or after December 15, 2026
COSO 2013 is de facto required framework — non-COSO choice creates additional burden of proof
ICFR scope only — broader operational or IT security controls outside financial reporting chain are not in SOX scope
